feedback.text: First off I would like to ask what does the word "buy" mean? what does it mean when the button I press on says "Buy"?, shouldn't that mean that I own the game? Is it fair for companies to just remove acces to what I bough, even if the game have no online functionality or have a single player mode? A end of service plan should only be fair, when a car manufacture stops service for a car, you can always find other mechanics to repair it. Here it's different, company stop service and we lose all possibilities to use our product unless we modify the game / files and in some cases that end up with threats of legal action.
